rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §37.1081, which governs school district public hearings on multihazard emergency operations plan noncompliance. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.1081. PUBLIC HEARING ON MULTIHAZARD EMERGENCY OPERATIONS PLAN NONCOMPLIANCE.
_note: No textual or substantive relationship between the proposed tax exemption change and this school safety hearing statute.
